message: Release workflow: test, build sysmon-go, and upload binaries

files.patch:
@@ -5,19 +5,56 @@ on:
     types: [published]
 
 jobs:
+  test:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          fetch-depth: 1
+
+      - name: Set up Go
+        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
+        with:
+          go-version: "1.22"
+
+      - name: Install shellcheck
+        run: sudo apt-get update -qq && sudo apt-get install -y shellcheck
+
+      - name: Go test
+        run: go test ./...
+
+      - name: Smoke tests
+        run: tests/smoke.sh
+
   publish-assets:
     permissions:
       contents: write
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: test
     steps:
       - name: Checkout
         uses: actions/checkout@v4
         with:
           fetch-depth: 1
 
+      - name: Set up Go
+        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
+        with:
+          go-version: "1.22"
+
+      - name: Build sysmon-go binaries
+        run: |
+          mkdir -p dist
+          GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build -o dist/sysmon-linux-amd64 ./cmd/sysmon
+          GOOS=linux GOARCH=arm64 go build -o dist/sysmon-linux-arm64 ./cmd/sysmon
+          ls -lh dist
+
       - name: Generate checksums
         run: |
           sha256sum install.sh > install.sh.sha256
+          sha256sum dist/sysmon-linux-amd64 >> install.sh.sha256
+          sha256sum dist/sysmon-linux-arm64 >> install.sh.sha256
           echo "Generated checksums:" && cat install.sh.sha256
 
       - name: Upload assets
@@ -27,5 +64,7 @@ jobs:
             install.sh
             install.sh.sha256
             verify.sh
+            dist/sysmon-linux-amd64
+            dist/sysmon-linux-arm64
         env:
           GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
